CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-28-2023 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B) AND CCP SECTION 583.250 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 583.210. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: S. LE; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and CCP SECTION 583.210 and SECTION 583.250. The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Nov-15-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 15, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
